## Description

Please provide a summary of the changes and the motivation behind them. Include any relevant context or background information.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that causes existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test update
- [ ] CI/CD or build process change
- [ ] Dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (`pnpm lint` passes)
- [ ] TypeScript compilation produces no errors (`pnpm typecheck` passes)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass (`pnpm test` passes)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added or updated JSDoc comments for public APIs
- [ ] I have followed the commit message conventions
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Testing

Describe the testing you performed:

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Tested with multiple adapters (if applicable)

### Test Results

```
Paste relevant test output here
```

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Include screenshots or GIFs demonstrating the changes if they affect the visual output or developer experience.

## Additional Notes

Add any additional notes for reviewers, such as:

- Design decisions and trade-offs
- Areas of concern
- Future improvements
- Migration considerations for breaking changes
